functions.title: Guide Book #83
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #83§r
§lSelvander§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Medium amphibian, Animal.
•§lSpawns in§r: Overgrown Jungle
•§lHealth§r: 15 §o(Wild)§r | 28 §o(Tamed)§r

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.22
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lTempted by§r: Cod, Pufferfish, Salmon, Tropical Fish.
•§lHealed by§r: Cod, Pufferfish, Salmon, Tropical Fish.
•§lBreeds with§r: Cod, Pufferfish, Salmon.
•§lAging by§r: Cod,

Pufferfish, Salmon, Tropical Fish.
•§lTamed by§r: Tropical Fish
•§lPossible drops§r: Amphibian Gills, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Wild)§r: Cod, Pufferfish, Salmon, Squid, Tadpole, Tropical Fish, Small Fishes.

•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2
•Wild Selvander can randomly sit.
•Tamed Selvander can be sat down.
•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.

•Wild Selvander can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•Wild Selvender carrying food will temporarily stop being aggressive towards the mobs they are aggressive with.
